# Switch

Toggles a setting on or off.

## Install

```bash
pnpm dlx @stalk-ui/cli add @stalk-ui/switch
```

## Examples

<ComponentPreview slug="switch" example={0} code={`<Switch label="Email notifications" />`} />

```tsx
<Switch label="Email notifications" />
```

<ComponentPreview
  slug="switch"
  example={1}
  code={`<Switch description="Send product updates." id="product-updates" label="Product updates" />`}
/>

```tsx
<Switch description="Send product updates." id="product-updates" label="Product updates" />
```

<ComponentPreview slug="switch" example={2} code={`<Switch invalid label="Required setting" />`} />

```tsx
<Switch invalid label="Required setting" />
```

## Props

| Prop          | Type         | Required | Default | Description |
| ------------- | ------------ | -------- | ------- | ----------- |
| `description` | `ReactNode`  | No       | -       | -           |
| `invalid`     | `boolean`    | No       | -       | -           |
| `label`       | `ReactNode`  | No       | -       | -           |
| `size`        | `SwitchSize` | No       | -       | -           |

No recipe variants are documented for this component.
